notes: Systematic review on alcohol and all-cause mortality
Study on alcohol and cardiovascular/cancer risk
WHO Q&A on red meat carcinogenicity — not relevant to alcohol resource. Replaced with the WHO alcohol fact sheet.
WHO Alcohol Fact Sheet — confirmed accessible June 2024 update; covers Group 1 carcinogen classification and 2.6M deaths figure
2025 Lancet: biases in all-cause mortality alcohol studies; challenges sick-quitter confounding. Does not undermine cancer/liver evidence. Not added as primary reference.
2024 cohort: even low-risk drinking raises mortality in older adults with health/SES risk factors. Consistent with resource framing.
2023 JAMA Network Open: updated meta-analysis on daily alcohol and all-cause mortality. Low/moderate not sig. for all-cause but higher levels show monotonic risk.
2024 Mendelian randomization: alcohol reduces lifespan in Europeans; weakens J-curve cardiovascular claim. Reflected in body text but not added as formal reference.
Large Korean cohort analysis: increasing alcohol intake raised cancer risk and reduction/cessation lowered risk relative to sustained drinking. Added from harvested Reddit leads.
